## What and why

Describe the change, why it is needed, and any relevant testing or screenshots.

## General checks

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.

## Content templates

Complete these checks when adding or changing PR templates:

- [ ] `npm run generate:templates` passes.
- [ ] `npm test` is green for English and Spanish instantiation.
- [ ] I previewed each template at `/dev/templates/<template-id>`.
- [ ] This pull request changes no more than 10 templates.
- [ ] JSON and template code use two-space indentation, including Markdown fences.
- [ ] I considered accurate optional Spanish (`localized.es`) copy.
